title: SemperHud
description: Minimalistic rpg-ish Hud allowing for easier read of information
body:
_RPG stylized hud that changes how health and other player info is displayed._  
  
Requires:  
- [Fabric Api](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
- [Cloth Config](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config)


**Current Features:**


**Health Bar**

*   Always taking same amount of space, showing % of Health
*   Animated when depleting
*   Changed textures - better clarity when affected by multiple status effects
*   Moved to top-left corner
*   Added Health Info widget showing current hp value


**Exp Bar**

*    Moved to top-left corenr
*    Animated when gaining exp
*    Added Exp info widget showing current level and exp needed to for next level


**Armor/Food/Air:**

*   Moved to top-left corner
*   Replaced with icon and value
*   Also includes armor toughness


**Hot Bar**_(can be turned off in config)_:

*   Moved to left side of screen
*   Retextured 
*   Fades out after some time passed since selected slot last changed


**At the time of uploading this mod is in it's infancy meaning there is prob a lot of conflicts with other mods.**

  
_**Future plans include:**_
(SOON TM)
*   _Resolving mod conflicts_
*   _More configurations_
*   _Make design more modular_
*   _Custom Status Effects display_
*   _Armor Durability display_
*   _Attack Indicator that isn't invisible(?)_
*   _Allowing for custom textures for widgets_
*   _Customize boss bar_
*   _Entity info(Hp bars maybe more)_
*   _Terraria like inventory and crafting_
*   _Bedrock doll when changing armor_
